title: Earth Brain Event
description: A schema for recording an Earth Brain OS event that connects AI agents, optical networks, knowledge archives, trace and attribution, royalty circulation, Kazene regulation, defense layers, and human governance.

event_id.description: A unique identifier for the Earth Brain OS event.

event_type.description: The type of Earth Brain OS event.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp of the event in ISO 8601 format.

summary.description: A short human-readable summary of the event.

ai_agent_layer.description: Information about the AI agent or agents involved in the event.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the AI agent or system involved.

agent_type.description: The type of AI agent involved.

role.description: The role played by the AI agent in this event.

human_supervision.description: The level of human supervision applied to the AI agent activity.

optical_nervous_layer.description: Information about communication, network, or synchronization infrastructure involved in the event.

network_type.description: The type of network or communication infrastructure involved.

latency_sensitivity.description: The degree to which the event depends on low-latency communication.

energy_awareness.description: Whether energy efficiency was considered in routing, computation, or synchronization.

knowledge_cortex_layer.description: Information about the knowledge archive, repository, dataset, or source used in the event.

source_type.description: The type of knowledge source involved.

source_ref.description: A reference to the source, such as a repository path, URL, document ID, or internal reference.

usage_type.description: How the knowledge source was used.

trace_attribution_layer.description: Trace and attribution information for the event.

trace_id.description: Identifier of the trace record associated with this event.

origin_ref.description: Reference to the origin or upstream contribution, if known.

contributor_ref.description: Reference to the contributor, creator, maintainer, or agent associated with the source.

attribution_status.description: The attribution status of the event.

trace_confidence.description: Confidence score for the trace and attribution record.

royalty_circulation_layer.description: Information about value return, royalty circulation, or contribution reward.

royalty_required.description: Whether this event requires royalty or value circulation handling.

value_route_id.description: Identifier for the value return or royalty route.

return_type.description: The type of return associated with the event.

circulation_status.description: The current status of royalty or value circulation.

kazene_regulation_layer.description: Kazene-style distributed regulation information for pressure diffusion, trust routing, and flow control.

pressure_level.description: The level of pressure or overload created by the event.

pressure_type.description: The primary type of pressure observed.

trust_route.description: The route assigned by the Kazene Regulation Layer.

regulation_action.description: The regulation action applied to the event.

defense_immune_layer.description: Defense, review, or immune response information for the event.

risk_level.description: The assessed risk level of the event.

review_status.description: The status of defense or governance review.

defense_action.description: The defense or immune action applied.

human_governance_layer.description: Human judgment, review, responsibility, and governance information for the event.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required for this event.

reviewer_ref.description: Reference to the human reviewer, maintainer, governance body, or responsible actor.

governance_status.description: The governance status of the event.

decision_note.description: A human-readable note explaining the governance decision.

lifecycle_status.description: The current lifecycle status of the Earth Brain OS event.

related_events.description: References to related Earth Brain OS events.
